01 — About Me

The Story Behind
the Frame

I'm Abhinav, a filmmaker and content creator based in Kerala, India. My work lives at the intersection of raw emotion and aesthetic precision — whether that's a short film, a cinematic reel, or a photograph that stops you mid-scroll.

My style is unhurried and intimate. I believe the best frames aren't taken — they're lived. Every project I take on is an attempt to bottle that feeling.

When I'm not behind the lens, I'm behind the wheel — I have a deep love for machines with character: classic jeeps, vintage bikes, anything that carries a story.
